title: CI HYGIENE HUB - 211info
text: CULTIVATE INITIATIVES CI HYGIENE HUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides showers, laundry services, clothing, and hygiene products. 14625 SE Stark Street Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Friday 10:30am-3pm, Tuesday-Thursday 9:30am-2pm Email (503) 477-9742 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 477-9742 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in; shower and laundry services are on a first-come, first-serve basis FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 20 Services: General Clothing Provision Laundry Facilities Personal/Grooming Supplies Public Showers/Baths Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
